overview.description: The Xtrackers US 0-1 Year Treasury ETF (TRSY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE US Treasury Short Bond index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury securities with 1-12 months remaining term to maturity. TRSY was launched on Oct 9, 2024 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: ICE US Treasury Short Bond Index
